COMPANIES ACT
(SYSTEM OF INTERCONNECTION OF REGISTERS)

[ L.S. 386.18

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.18
REGOLAMENTI DWAR COMPANIES ACT (SYSTEM
OF INTERCONNECTION OF REGISTERS)
8 ta’ Awwissu, 2017
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 201 tal-2017, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 423 tal2021 u 68 tal-2024.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
